summary: Verified the loading spinner timeout fix for EkoLivePayment component. The fix adds an 8 second AbortController timeout, after which static fallback billers are displayed. All tests pass - 17 frontend tests and 8 backend tests. The loading spinner no longer persists indefinitely.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified timeout fix for EkoLivePayment component. The fix works correctly - AbortController with 8 second timeout triggers fallback billers when Eko API doesn't respond. Tests verified: 1) Fallback billers appear within ~8-10 seconds for Mobile, DTH, and Electricity services. 2) Loading spinner disappears after providers load. 3) Provider selection UI works after fallback. Previous issue (iteration 82) is now resolved.

fix_verification.issue: Loading spinner persisted indefinitely when Eko API timed out
fix_verification.fix_applied: AbortController with 8 second timeout in fetchBillers function, finally block always sets loading to false
fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - Fallback billers appear within 8-10 seconds, spinner stops, UI is functional
